steps.action: Open /admin/articles/new and fill title, URI, short/full WYSIWYG content, display=Yes, keywords, weight, two categories, attachment title+file
steps.expected: All provided fields accepted in add form
steps.observed: All fields accepted; category checkboxes selected and attachment chosen

steps.expected: Article persisted with attachment and category/tag relations
steps.observed: Redirected to /admin/articles/13/edit; API/DB show persisted article, attachment, categories, tags

evidence.network: Browser network export includes POST /api/admin/articles during create flow (see evidence/network-requests.json); curl GET /api/admin/articles/13 -> HTTP 200 with persisted payload
evidence.dbChecks: articles.id=13 persisted with article_uri=g7core-full-uri-20260319113257, article_display=y, article_order=7; attachments row exists (attach_id=1, attach_file=1773938074371_g7core_attachment.txt); file exists at app/uploads/13/1773938074371_g7core_attachment.txt

assertions.title: Add article with minimum required fields

steps.action: Open /admin/articles/new, fill only Title (g7core minimal uri 20260319113257), leave URI blank and submit

evidence.network: POST /api/admin/articles followed by GET /api/admin/articles/14 captured in browser network export
evidence.dbChecks: articles.id=14 created with article_title='g7core minimal uri 20260319113257', article_uri='g7core-minimal-uri-20260319113257', article_order=0, article_author=1

assertions.title: Add article — auto-generates URI from title

steps.action: Create minimal article with URI field intentionally blank
steps.observed: Edit form URI value is g7core-minimal-uri-20260319113257

evidence.network: POST /api/admin/articles in browser network export for created record id=14

steps.expected: Short/full rich-text editors with formatting toolbar controls are visible
steps.observed: Both editors rendered with toolbar buttons (B, I, code, bulleted list, numbered list, link, undo, redo)

evidence.network: GET /admin/articles/new and related editor assets loaded in browser network export

steps.action: Select g7core_cat_a_20260319113257 and g7core_cat_b_20260319113257 checkboxes on add form and save
steps.observed: Edit form shows both checkboxes checked; junction rows saved for both categories

evidence.network: curl GET /api/admin/articles?search=g7core_full_20260319113257 -> HTTP 200 and categories array includes cat_id 6 + 7
evidence.dbChecks: article2cat has rows (article_id_rel=13, category_id_rel=6) and (article_id_rel=13, category_id_rel=7)

assertions.title: Add article — Save redirects to edit page

steps.action: Submit Save on add form (full and minimal variants)
steps.expected: Redirect to edit/{id} with populated form

evidence.network: POST /api/admin/articles followed by GET /api/admin/articles/{id} captured in browser network export
evidence.dbChecks: Edit forms were pre-populated for IDs 13 and 14 after redirect

steps.expected: Both timestamps are set on creation
steps.observed: id=13: date=1773938074, modified=1773938074; id=14: date=1773938134, modified=1773938134; both within ~3 minutes of now

evidence.network: curl GET /api/admin/articles/13 -> HTTP 200 includes articleDate and articleModified
evidence.dbChecks: SQLite query confirms non-null, equal create timestamps for ids 13 and 14; python delta check: +161s and +101s from current epoch

assertions.title: Add article — records current user as author

steps.action: Create article while logged in as admin
steps.observed: article_author=1 for ids 13 and 14; edit form author list shows selected 'admin admin@example.com'

evidence.network: curl GET /api/admin/articles/13 -> HTTP 200 with author object { userId: 1, username: 'admin' }
evidence.dbChecks: articles table: article_author=1 on ids 13 and 14

frictions.description: agent-browser network export does not include HTTP status codes for each request entry
frictions.resolution: Captured supplemental authenticated curl responses with explicit HTTP status for key article endpoints

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 8 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Core article creation behaviors validated for full and minimal submissions, URI generation, WYSIWYG rendering, category persistence, redirect behavior, timestamps, and author attribution.
